summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a rare June ’69 set with a monster Dark Star, complete Other One and soaring Cryptical Reprise.
review: The recording is praised as an outstanding sound‑board transfer that upgrades all previous copies, delivering crystal‑clear detail. Musically the show shines with extended jams – a blazing Dark Star, a full “That's It for the Other One,” beautiful Cryptical Reprise and inspired segues like China Cat Sunflower > Top of the World.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are highly enthusiastic about both performance and audio quality; the show features several rare, extended jams and the soundboard source is described as a major upgrade, justifying a near‑top rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear transfer; reviewers call it an “upgrade” and say it sounds absolutely great with full dynamic range and no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows superbly with long, exploratory jams and seamless transitions, highlighted by a rare complete Other One and expansive sequences.
